MIS_TOOLTIP_NEW: Initialize a new autonomous mission context
MIS_EMPTY_TITLE: No missions currently active in this sector.
MIS_EMPTY_DESC: Deploy an agent or schedule a job to begin swarm operations.
MIS_EVENT_FAIL_ALPHA: Mission Failed: No Alpha Node designated for "{{param:name}}".
MIS_EVENT_FAIL_OBJECTIVE: Mission Failed: Objective not defined for "{{param:name}}".
MIS_EVENT_ERROR_ALPHA_NOT_FOUND: ❌ Critical Error: Alpha Node not found in registry.
MIS_EMPTY_DESC_CLUSTER: Select a cluster from the sidebar to manage its objectives and team.
MIS_TOOLTIP_RUN: Broadcast mission objective to all cluster nodes and initiate execution
MIS_TOOLTIP_ANALYSIS: Enable real-time behavior analysis and safety audits for this mission
MIS_TOOLTIP_CREATE_CLUSTER: Launch a new mission cluster deployment
MIS_TOOLTIP_BUDGET: Allocated neural credits for this swarm branch. Controls resource priority.
MIS_LABEL_VISUALIZE_ALPHA: Designate Alpha Node to visualize cluster
MIS_TOOLTIP_UNASSIGN: Remove agent from this mission cluster
MIS_EMPTY_AGENTS_DESC: All available agents have been assigned to clusters
JOB_HEADER_TOOLTIP: Manage autonomous mission persistence, agent triggers, and temporal swarm orchestration.
JOB_JOB_NAME_TOOLTIP: Unique identifier for this temporal mission.
JOB_TARGET_AGENT_TOOLTIP: Select the neural node responsible for mission execution.
JOB_TARGET_WORKFLOW_TOOLTIP: Select a multi-step sequence to run on a temporal trigger.
JOB_CRON_TOOLTIP: Standard UTC cron string defining the temporal trigger frequency.
JOB_MISSION_PROMPT_TOOLTIP: The core operational directive for the autonomous agent.
JOB_BUDGET_CAP_TOOLTIP: Maximum neural credits (USD) allocated per mission run.
JOB_MAX_FAILURES_TOOLTIP: Safety threshold: Job auto-disables after consecutive failures.
JOB_CONFIRM_PURGE_MESSAGE: Are you certain you wish to purge the scheduled job "{{param:name}}"? This will permanently stop all future executions and archive the run history.
WS_TOOLTIP_NEW: Initialize a new project-level workspace context
WS_EMPTY_DESC: Create a workspace to organize files and agent directives.
WS_TOOLTIP_SYNC: Synchronize local file changes with the Tadpole Engine neural cache.
WS_LABEL_SYNC_STATUS: FILE SYSTEM & REPOSITORY SYNC • {{param:count}} ACTIVE WORKSPACES
WS_TOOLTIP_ROOT: Cluster Root: Persistent storage and model context cache
WS_EMPTY_BRANCHES: No pending merges for this cluster
WS_TOOLTIP_MERGE: Approve and merge changes to cluster main branch
STAND_SUBTITLE: Automated status reconciliation and cross-agent coordination.
TR_TOOLTIP_INTERFACE: High-fidelity voice uplink to specific agents or mission clusters for direct neural coordination.
TR_TOOLTIP_AGENT: Direct sync with a specific sovereign agent node.
TR_TOOLTIP_CLUSTER: Broadcast sync to all agents within a mission cluster
TR_TOOLTIP_END: Terminate neural uplink and close channel.
TR_TOOLTIP_START: Initialize sovereign channel for neural handoff.
TR_TOOLTIP_TRANSCRIPT: Live stream of processed neural communications and STT translations.
TR_MSG_ONLINE: Voice Communications Online. Select target and click 'Start Sync'.
TR_MSG_FAILED: Transcription failed or no audio detected.
